rulings.Case Title: ANGELA LEUNG VS. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LP DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff did not sufficiently allege damages for the first cause of action for breach of contract and the second cause of action for breach of good faith and fair dealing. As to the third cause of action for unfair business practices, Plaintiff did not sufficiently allege that Defendant made misrepresentations to Plaintiff about the availability of commercial units. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA LEUNG VS. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STONESTOWN MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC. DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff alleged sufficient facts to establish a cause of action for unfair business practices against Defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ROSE COURT, LLC ET AL VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Pre;Iminary Injuction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2019 line 5. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injuction is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show irreparable harm an likelihood of prevailing on the merits. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HELEN DUONG VS. DON T CAREY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT DON CAREY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is GRANTED. No objection filed. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith an exemption from SFRO, e.g. that the rental unit at issue in this case is located in a structure for which a certificate of occupancy was first issued after the effective date of this ordinance. = (501/CFH)
